privileged_info_summary: Patient Emily Watson (ID: 80701, DOB: 1978-06-22) is a synthetically created record in the OSCAR EMR system for task testing purposes. The task requires documenting specific family medical history: father with Type 2 Diabetes and Myocardial Infarction (deceased at age 61), mother with Breast Cancer and Hypertension (living, age 70), and brother with Asthma (living, age 43). Access is via default OSCAR demo credentials (oscardoc/oscar/PIN:1117). All patient data is synthetic, created during task setup via INSERT statements into the OSCAR database.
